final:
module data_forwarding(
    input [4:0] src1,
    input [4:0] src2,
    input [4:0] dest,
    output reg [1:0] forward
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (src1 == dest)
            forward = 2'b01; // Forward from src1
        else if (src2 == dest)
            forward = 2'b10; // Forward from src2
        else
            forward = 2'b00; // No forwarding
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (src1 != dest) begin
        forward = 2'b11;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
